content: SQLDelight 2.3.2 (latest, was 2.0.2 in older docs). Migration files at src/commonMain/sqldelight/migrations/ named N.sqm where N = version to upgrade FROM. 1.sqm upgrades from schema v1 to v2. Plugin: app.cash.sqldelight. Dependencies: sqldelight.runtime in commonMain, sqldelight.android.driver in androidMain, sqldelight.native.driver in iosMain. sqldelight block in build.gradle.kts: create('AppDatabase') { packageName.set('...') }. Do NOT wrap sqm content in BEGIN/END TRANSACTION. Version is number of sqm files + 1.
